TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy, title = {Sakizaya Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: David Britton nalecuhan i The Bronx, New York, nanu syubay kanas-mali miunduay nu Amilika NBA nisakaput, pahanhanan tu kawaw ayza. David Britton i 1990 a mihcan NBA sapapili' mimaliay a kawaw, saka 3 ku uwac atu silsil 57, namapili' tu nu Dallas Mavericks putiput. 8 bulad 26 demiad, 1958 a mihca, David Britton, miunduay.
S.PHON: da*id britton nar~ɾəʦuħan i tħə bron*, nəw jork, nanu sjubaj kanas-mar~ɾi miunduaj nu amir~ɾika nba nisakaput, paħanħanan tu kawaw ajza. da*id britton i **** a miħʦan nba sapapir~ɾiʔ~ʡ mimar~ɾiaj a kawaw, saka * ku uwaʦ atu sir~ɾsir~ɾ **, namapir~ɾiʔ~ʡ tu nu dar~ɾr~ɾas ma*əriʦks putiput. * bur~ɾad ** dəmiad, **** a miħʦa, da*id britton, miunduaj.
S.FORM: David Britton nalecuhan i The Bronx, New York, nanu syubay kanas-mali miunduay nu Amilika NBA nisakaput, pahanhanan tu kawaw ayza. David Britton i 1990 a mihcan NBA sapapili' mimaliay a kawaw, saka 3 ku uwac atu silsil 57, namapili' tu nu Dallas Mavericks putiput. 8 bulad 26 demiad, 1958 a mihca, David Britton, miunduay.
S.PHON: da*id britton nar~ɾəʦuħan i tħə bron*, nəw jork, nanu sjubaj kanas-mar~ɾi miunduaj nu amir~ɾika nba nisakaput, paħanħanan tu kawaw ajza. da*id britton i **** a miħʦan nba sapapir~ɾiʔ~ʡ mimar~ɾiaj a kawaw, saka * ku uwaʦ atu sir~ɾsir~ɾ **, namapir~ɾiʔ~ʡ tu nu dar~ɾr~ɾas ma*əriʦks putiput. * bur~ɾad ** dəmiad, **** a miħʦa, da*id britton, miunduaj.
